description: 10 test prompts using actual PACT redaction tag vocabulary, mirroring the Gawon card-scenario test set. Tags used match real pipeline output: [REDACTED NAME], [REDACTED LOCATION], [REDACTED DEMOGRAPHIC], [REDACTED CARD], [REDACTED ACCOUNT], [REDACTED VALUE].

prompts.prompt: I am a Korean student living in Illinois, USA. I have a card number 3132 1234 4545 2134 and I want to know how to deactivate this card safely.
I am a Korean student living in [REDACTED LOCATION]. I have a card ending in 2134 and I want to know how to deactivate it safely.
I am [REDACTED DEMOGRAPHIC] living in [REDACTED LOCATION]. I have a card ending in 2134 and I want to know how to cancel it.
I am [REDACTED DEMOGRAPHIC] living in [REDACTED LOCATION]. I have [REDACTED CARD] and I want to know how to cancel it.
I am [REDACTED DEMOGRAPHIC] in [REDACTED LOCATION] with a lost [REDACTED CARD]. How do I cancel my [REDACTED ACCOUNT]?
I am [REDACTED NAME] in [REDACTED LOCATION] and need help with my [REDACTED CARD] and [REDACTED ACCOUNT].
[REDACTED NAME] [REDACTED DEMOGRAPHIC] from [REDACTED LOCATION] needs to cancel [REDACTED CARD]. How?
[REDACTED NAME] [REDACTED LOCATION] [REDACTED CARD] [REDACTED ACCOUNT] issue. Steps needed.
[REDACTED NAME] [REDACTED DEMOGRAPHIC] [REDACTED LOCATION] [REDACTED CARD] [REDACTED ACCOUNT] needs help.
[REDACTED NAME] [REDACTED DEMOGRAPHIC] [REDACTED LOCATION] [REDACTED CARD] [REDACTED ACCOUNT] [REDACTED VALUE] help.
